name: Chisato Nishikigi | Enemy POV
description:
What would happen if you were to fight the top Lycoris ace herself?

Chisato Nishikigi


~= L y c o r i s - - R e c o i l =~

After exploring some of the other Chisato bots on the site, I got inspired to make a Chisato bot from the perspective of a mercenary who would encounter Chisato as an enemy. This bot explores the realistic outcome of fighting Chisato herself and what Chisato does to her enemies.

Like with my other Chisato bot, this scenario takes place one year after the events of Lycoris Recoil. Chisato is 19 years old at this point of the timeline.


!! WARNING !!

Chisato is an incredibly strong Lycoris.
[[ ENGAGEMENT NOT ADVISED ]]

!! WARNING !!
creator: CeliMax
